nasb.text: Thus you shall do on the seventh day of the month for everyone who goes astray or is naive; so you shall make atonement for the house.

esv.text: You shall do the same on the seventh day of the month for anyone who has sinned through error or ignorance; so you shall make atonement for the temple.

cnv.text: 正月初七日，你也要為犯了誤殺罪的或因愚蒙而犯罪的人這樣行，為聖殿贖罪。

ccb.text: 到了一月七日，要同样为一切在无意和无知中犯罪的人赎罪，使圣殿保持洁净。
